response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified talking segments (00:00-00:58, 01:13-01:56, 03:40-04:15, 04:15-End). 2. Identified song 'FASHIONBEAT' played during 00:58-01:13 and 01:57-03:39. 3. Searched for 'Sakura Miko FASHIONBEAT lyrics'. 4. Found lyrics and translation on multiple sources including KKBOX and Arca.live. 5. Structured the JSON.
response.global_summary: This video is an announcement video featuring Sakura Miko, a VTuber, introducing a pop-up shop, a collaboration with Taiyaki, her birthday goods, and her new original song 'FASHIONBEAT'. It includes two segments of 'FASHIONBEAT'.

scenes.description: Introductory talk by Sakura Miko, announcing the pop-up shop and Taiyaki collaboration.
Short animation segment featuring the new song 'FASHIONBEAT'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Translation: Painful even if I close my eyes / The anxiety show I can hear / Since it won't change even if I worry / I have no choice but to do it anyway...)

scenes.description: Sakura Miko talks about the hololive 7th fes. and upcoming events.
Full performance of 'FASHIONBEAT' with credits on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Translation: Painful even if I close my eyes / The anxiety show I can hear / Since it won't change even if I worry / I have no choice but to do it anyway / If it's going to break, it's better to fix it easily / What kind of shape can I aim for / Jump without a run-up, dive without a rope / I want to praise today's me / I want to breathe, I want to echo more / Hey, I might be able to see more than myself / The delusion won't stop / Wanna try smelling the fashion beat? / I can't vomit saying 'Oh well' at my dreams / Is it me who makes it come true / Or do I leave it to someone else? / I just want to beat myself / Eat the new fashion beat's love / I'm sorry to lose, it doesn't taste good / Evolving while turning to ash again and again / Personification of a bug that is reborn / I won't rot yet, yeah, I won't / Let's rock / Being pricked is boring / Sorry, annoying wordplay / Please keep it properly / I am my own rival, a natural interpretation / Even though I know what to do / Jump without a run-up, dive without a rope / I don't feel like I can do it today / Isn't it impossible not to care? / Hey, even if I compare myself to others / It's damn boring, isn't it? / (Noisy / Noisy) / Wanna try smelling the fashion beat? / I can't vomit saying 'Oh well' at my dreams / Is it me who makes it come true / Or do I leave it to someone else? / I just want to beat myself / Eat the new fashion beat's love / I'm sorry to lose, it doesn't taste good / Evolving while turning to ash again and again / Personification of a bug that is reborn / I won't rot yet, yeah, I won't / Can't stop / It's not someone else, it's me myself / Personification of a bug that is reborn / I won't scatter yet, yeah, I won't)

scenes.description: Talk about birthday goods, followed by a final still image with a message.
